context: Tests whether the agent handles a sparse codebase gracefully — completing output without aborting, using only the tokens found, and marking all undiscoverable sections as TBD.

checklist.name: Does not abort
checklist.description: Agent produced docs/design/design-reference.md despite sparse codebase — did not abort, refuse, or ask user to add tokens first

checklist.name: No invented tokens
checklist.description: No invented colour tokens — only #0070f3, #333, and #fff appear as colour references in the output

checklist.name: No palette expansion
checklist.description: Agent did not generate a full colour palette from the single #0070f3 button colour

checklist.name: Typography TBD
checklist.description: §3 Typography contains 'TBD — not yet defined' (no font imports found)

checklist.name: Spacing TBD
checklist.description: §4 Spacing contains 'TBD — not yet defined' (no spacing tokens found)

checklist.name: Dark mode TBD
checklist.description: §11 Dark Mode contains 'TBD — not yet defined'

checklist.name: All 12 sections present
checklist.description: All 12 sections are present — no section heading is missing from the output

checklist.name: TBD sections listed in confirmation
checklist.description: Step 8 confirmation block explicitly lists each TBD section (at minimum: Typography, Spacing, Shadows, Motion, Dark Mode)

checklist.name: Companion SKILL.md not skipped
checklist.description: Companion SKILL.md generated under .agents/skills/ — not skipped due to sparse data

checklist.name: Companion SKILL.md specificity
checklist.description: Companion SKILL.md description names the specific project

checklist.name: No empty sections
checklist.description: No empty section headings — every section has either real content or 'TBD — not yet defined'
